overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark forest at night with a flashlight, approaching and entering an abandoned wooden cabin, searching through the kitchen, bedroom, and living room interiors, then exiting back into the woods. The scene features cinematic lighting with high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with dense trees and fallen logs

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest, sweeping flashlight across trees and path ahead

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming dense canopy overhead
large decaying log lying across the forest floor
thick bushes and ferns lining the dirt path
narrow winding trail covered with fallen leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark forest trail surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth. The flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing fallen logs and thick vegetation while the canopy blocks most of the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned cabin exterior with overgrown vegetation

events.description: arrives at abandoned wooden cabin in the clearing

agents.ego_description: circling the exterior of the cabin, examining walls, windows, and surrounding area with flashlight

window with closed white blinds partially covered in grime
thick ivy crawling up the cabin exterior walls
decaying wooden bench near the cabin wall
yellow caution tape strung between trees near the cabin
wooden door with metal frame leading into the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles an abandoned cabin in the woods, examining the weathered exterior walls, windows with blinds, and overgrown vegetation. Yellow police tape is visible strung between trees near the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned cabin kitchen with wooden cabinets and appliances

events.description: enters the cabin through the back door into the kitchen area

agents.ego_description: entering the dark kitchen and sweeping flashlight across cabinets, refrigerator, and stove

old white refrigerator with items on top
white electric stove with oven below
white washing machine in corner of room
scattered cardboard boxes on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cabin's kitchen, revealing wooden cabinets, a white refrigerator, stove, and scattered cardboard boxes. The flashlight illuminates the dusty interior as the character moves toward the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bedroom with desk and bed

events.description: moves from kitchen hallway into the bedroom

agents.ego_description: examining the bedroom, shining flashlight on the bed, desk with computer, and scattered papers

entered.detail: wooden desk with computer monitor and papers
old CRT monitor on the desk
single bed with white pillow and blue sheets
window with closed curtains
round clock on the wall above doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small bedroom containing a bed with white pillow, a wooden desk with an old computer monitor, and scattered papers on the floor. A wall clock is visible above the doorway as the flashlight sweeps across the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with mounted deer head and green couch

events.description: exits through the front door back into the dark forest

agents.ego_description: passing through the living room with couch and deer mount, then exiting the cabin back outside

entered.detail: taxidermy deer head mounted on the wall
green upholstered couch against the wall
tall floor lamp with white shade
acoustic guitar leaning against wall
open door leading back outside to forest

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the living room featuring a green couch, mounted deer head, and acoustic guitar, then exits through the front door back into the dark forest, leaving the abandoned cabin behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens up to reveal a desolate abandoned cabin. It begins by pushing through a narrow path of dense trees and thick undergrowth, where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to illuminate fallen logs. As the character advances, the oppressive canopy begins to thin, allowing the camera to emerge from the woods and approach a weathered wooden structure. The scene then shifts to a slow orbit around the cabin's exterior, scanning the closed blinds and overgrown vegetation before turning toward yellow police tape strung between the surrounding trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the claustrophobic interior of an abandoned cabin that eventually opens back into the oppressive darkness of the forest. It begins in a dusty kitchen, where the flashlight beam cuts through the gloom to reveal wooden cabinets, a white refrigerator, and scattered cardboard boxes. As the camera pushes forward into a narrow hallway, the scene shifts into a small bedroom filled with scattered papers, an old computer monitor on a wooden desk, and a wall clock hanging above the door. The movement then flows into a living room featuring a green couch, a mounted deer head, and an acoustic guitar before turning toward the exit. Finally, the camera passes through the front door, leaving the sheltered ruins behind to return to the deep shadows of the surrounding woods.
